title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates!
